Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Whew, that does it for our first day back...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Well, you two have perfect timing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Huh...? Why's she wearin' a school uniform!? What's going on here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}She said she wanted to go to school with us, so I told the others as a joke...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}But the chairman actually agreed, so now she's gonna start as a second-year tomorrow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Seriously!? He's down with that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}He said something about studying her behavior in a social environment...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Well, if he's cool with it, then I guess it's alright...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Besides, I'd say it looks pretty good on her. Maybe even... cute?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}The school camouflage that Fuuka-san provided is more than appropriate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}It looks very natural on you. No one will suspect a thing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}But, why do you want to go to school? It's not like it's interesting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}As the second semester commences, I intend to synchronize my schedule with everyone for maximum efficiency.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}If I remain here on standby, it could affect our deployment efficiency.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}To accommodate, I requested reassignment alongside our squad leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Deployment efficiency, huh... Why do I feel like you being at school would make that even worse?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I will make any necessary adaptations as the situation evolves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}He says, "I want to go to school, too."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Koromaru... No, you definitely have to stay here, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
